title: astragalus tricholobus
intro: Astragalus tricholobus, also known as Milk Vetch or White Milk Vetch, is a plant species within the legume family that is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus tricholobus include reducing stress and fatigue, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Astragalus tricholobus is commonly prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tea, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
